creator: igorpopov@newmail.ru
text:
I have motherboard(Asus A8N-E) that built on nforce4 chipset.  It has usb
2.0 ports, but under FreeBSD with usb 2.0 flashdrive max speed near
1.2Mb/s on file copying (my custom kernel has ehci driver).  That is
usb1.[01] speed. But under both linux an windows with the same flashdrive
speed is near 10Mb/s.
